author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 5 COMPLETE. 5/5 subissues closed. 75 vision tests + 623 prior = 698 total workspace tests, all passing. Implemented: ResNet-18/34/50 (BasicBlock, Bottleneck, residual connections, ~11-25M parameters), MNIST/CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100 synthetic datasets, model registry (list_models, get_model, register_model), FeatureExtractor, vision transforms (Resize nearest-neighbor, CenterCrop, VisionToTensor HWC->CHW, VisionNormalize with ImageNet defaults). Deferred: VGG, ViT, EfficientNet, ConvNeXt, Swin, U-Net, YOLO (follow same Module pattern), pretrained weight download, image I/O.
